titleStmt.title: SII 22.68: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 68. (A.R. No. 68 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA I—40th YEAR (A.D. 1109-10)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc. It registers the gift as tax-free dēvadāna of a village by name Kuḷakkuḍi alias Vīraśōḻanallūr on the south bank of the Peṇṇai by a royal order issued at the request of Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ Śuttamallaṉ Muḍigoṇḍāṉ, for the requirements of the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaram-uḍaiya-Mahādēva at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram on the northern bank of the river and situated in Vāṇagappāḍi Rājēndra-vaḷanāḍu. The antarāyam tax included in the transaction is fixed at 79 kaḻañju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa
nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi
cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉ
ṉava ririyaluṟṟuḻitarat tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkaranaṭā
tti virasiṅhāsanattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟ
ṟiruntaruḷiya govirājakecari paṉmmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī ko
lottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu nāṟpatāvatu vāṇakappāṭi rāje
ntravaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakaraic caṇpaiyāṉa virarāje
ntrapurattut tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Īśvarammuṭaiya mahādevarkku ve
ṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku kuṟaivutira Oru Ūrriṭaveṇṭumeṉṟu vāṇa
kovaraiyan cuttamallaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ viṇṇappañcey
ya Ippaṭikku Ūriṭat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷa Iṭṭa Ūrkkup
puravuḷvari tiṇaikkaḷattār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭi vā
ṇakoppāṭi rājentravaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭakaraic caṇ
paiyāṉa virarājentrapurattut tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Īśvaramu
ṭaiya mahādevarkku Iṟuppatāṉa paḻampaṭi tavirttu I
tdevarkku nāṟpatāvatumutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa de
vatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa Iṉnāṭṭup peṇṇait
teṉkarai kuḷakkuṭiyāṉa viracoḻanallūr mā
ṭai nāṟpattumukkaḻañce Onpatu mañcāṭi
yum Eḻumāvināl pon Eḻupattonpatinkaḻañcum An
tarāyam Uṭpaṭat devatānam Iṟaiili Iṭṭamaikku
c cantrotitavaṟ celvatāka Itu paṉmāyeśvara Irakṣai me
ṟpaṭi Ūrkkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai cippontaikku
ppona peruvaḻikku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkattukkup pāyn=ta
vāykkālukkut teṟkum Uṇṭāṉ Erikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai cip
kaliṅkāṟṟukku vaṭakkum teṉmeṟku Erikku kkāl
vāykku vaṭakkum Itaṉ meṟmaṭattuttuṟai Ūṭaṟuttu teṟkeṉikki
vaṭakkum Itaṉ meṟkku muṉṟā ṉ kaṭaikku vaṭakku melpā
ṟkellai pākkattukkup poṉa peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum talaivāyai Ūṭaṟu
ppon=ta peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṭapa
kku teṟkkum nātūrerik kiḻkaṭaip peruvaḻikkut teṟkum peṇ
ṇait teṉkarai Īraṅkoḷḷip pāṟaikku teṟkkum Iṉnāṉku Ellaiyuḷ Uḷppa
ṭṭa nilam An=tarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣaiḥ ..
Digital edition of SII 22.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
